THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, SEAN M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES $1,572.14 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,660.14, THE COURT FINDS THE SECURITY DEPOSIT DEDUCTION FOR DAMAGES WERE MADE FOR ITEMS OF REASONABLE WEAR AND TEAR OR NOT SUPPORTED BY ADEQUATE DOCUMENTATION PER CIVIL CODE 1950.5 (G).
